prompts: The chibi elderly character slowly opens their arms wider toward the horizon, head tilting up with a growing smile. Camera dramatically pushes in from mid-shot to close-up on the face. Morning light intensifies gently across the scene. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The three chibi villagers walk slowly across the foreground, heads turned toward the sun, steam rising gently from their cups. Camera pans softly left to right revealing the full piazza. Swallows drift across the golden sky in the background. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character slumps further, head drooping slowly toward the table with a heavy exhale. Camera holds static then slowly pulls back, making the dim room feel more closed in. The curtain sways slightly from an unseen draft. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The glowing lantern inside the chibi brain pulses with a soft warm light that grows steadily brighter. The connecting ink-line paths between the icons animate one by one, lighting up in sequence. Camera slowly orbits around the brain illustration. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character lifts their face fully toward the sky, closing their eyes with a relaxed, energized expression. A gentle breeze sways the herb pots on the balcony. Camera slowly pushes in toward the character's sunlit face. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.

The chibi character waves both arms enthusiastically toward the viewer, bouncing slightly with joy. Camera slowly zooms out to reveal the full sunny piazza behind them. Warm light flickers softly on the fountain water in the background. Parameters: non-fixed camera, 9:16, 5s, 1080p.
